intro: Kneiffia pumila is a small, succulent plant species native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, contributing to its potential benefits in reducing pain, swelling, and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Kneiffia pumila include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other secondary metabolites, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties.
